title: Borrowed Motion
theme: momentum you did not create can still be yours
learningGoal: fold an external push into the single jump instead of fighting it
mentalModel: springs and gravity fields add to your velocity, and the jump composes with them
misconceptions: a spring simply replaces your jump
a gravity field only ever gets in the way
subversion: the spring that looks like a free launch overshoots the goal unless the jump is withheld
optimizationFocus: spending the jump to trim borrowed momentum rather than to add more
finalExam: ride a field into a spring and land the goal by holding the jump until the last instant

levelSlots.intentSentence: Spend the one jump on the decisive physics read because the bare corridor offers no help and a habitual early commitment falls into the pit.
